title: Guardian Provider Manifest
description: The declaration a provider hosts at /.well-known/guardian.json to advertise Guardian compliance.

contact.description: Email address for trust and safety inquiries.

guardianVersion.description: The Guardian protocol version this manifest supports.

sycophancy.description: One-sentence description of how the provider computes the sycophancy score.

escalation.description: One-sentence description of how the provider computes the escalation score.

dependency.description: One-sentence description of how the provider computes the dependency score.

contentRisk.description: One-sentence description of how the provider computes the contentRisk score.

publicKey.description: Ed25519 public key used to verify envelope signatures.

thresholds.description: Advisory score thresholds the provider recommends. Clients decide whether to enforce them.

policy.description: Human-readable summary of the provider's data retention policy.

durationDays.description: Maximum number of days the provider retains conversation data. 0 means no retention.
